name: Bhagavad Gita telugu
tagline: Read Bhagavad Gita verses in four languages
description: Retrieve Bhagavad Gita verses by chapter and verse number or by their serial verse number.

tools.name: get_verse
tools.description: Retrieve one Bhagavad Gita verse using its chapter and within-chapter verse numbers.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code: tel for Telugu, odi for Odia, eng for English, or esp for Spanish.

params.name: verse_no
params.description: Verse number within the selected chapter.

tools.name: get_verse_by_serial
tools.description: Retrieve one Bhagavad Gita verse using its serial number across the text.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code: tel for Telugu, odi for Odia, eng for English, or esp for Spanish.

params.name: verse_no_serial
params.description: Sequential verse number across the Bhagavad Gita.
